record.title: Path 2 LP-074 Final Certification — 2294
record.units: billions of layer credits, constant 2292 purchasing power

chronology.event: No Path 2 run; the original framework imposed no mandatory commencement duty
LP-075 created a mandatory commencement duty without setting a rate
Audit design, evidence rules, methods, and source definitions locked
Audit completed; Schedules A and B independently certified; effective notice published
The complete LP-074 exact halving cascade entered force

scmScope.lower2AndLower3: only canon-covered UBI and Primary Job Subsidy savings categories

sourceInputs.description: The controlling fictional historical observations fixed at the 2292 lock and published with the 2294 certification. Completed observations end by the section 6.2 cutoff; projections may target later periods only from preregistered transformations over admissible pre-lock inputs. Every result below is recomputed from keyed annual or monthly evidence; thresholds are pinned only in the verifier.
